entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop being studied for resistance to blast disease

entities.name: FOLIAR BLAST
entities.description: A disease caused by Pyricularia grisea affecting pearl millet

entities.name: PYRICULARIA GRISEA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes blast disease in pearl millet

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the incidence of blast disease in pearl millet has increased

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist disease, used as a management strategy

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method to identify resistance using infector rows, spray inoculation, and perfo-irrigation

entities.name: GREENHOUSE SCREENING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A method to identify resistance using spray inoculation of seedlings and a misting system

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL SPRAY INOCULATION
entities.description: The process of applying a spore suspension of P. grisea to plants

entities.name: PERFO-IRRIGATION
entities.description: A technique used to maintain high humidity in field screening

entities.name: MISTING SYSTEM
entities.description: A system used to maintain high humidity in greenhouse screening

entities.name: BLAST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The trait of being resistant to foliar blast disease

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease to which blast-resistant pearl millet lines also showed resistance

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved pearl millet hybrids with blast resistance
